title: Aurelia La Texana
overview: Aurelia, a young woman, witnesses the murder of her mother after a betrayal linked to a smuggling operation. Marked by the tragedy, she grows up determined to uncover the truth behind the order that led to her mother’s death.  Strong and fearless like her grandmother Camelia, Aurelia enters the dangerous world of crime. She begins working for Romeo, a man who hires assassins to eliminate corrupt officials and members of the mafia.  Moving through a world of smuggling, betrayal, and violence, Aurelia never loses sight of her true objective: to find the person responsible for ordering her mother’s murder and make them pay.
